title: No Relief For Lalu, Delhi HC Rejects RJD Chief’s Plea To Quash CBI FIR In Land-for-Jobs Case
description: The case pertains to alleged irregular appointments to Group D posts in the West Central Zone of Indian Railways, headquartered in Jabalpur, during Lalu Prasad’s tenure between 2004 and 2009. According to the CBI, jobs were allegedly granted in exchange for land parcels transferred in the names of Lalu’s family members and associates.
